column1: Note : From Vinnamangalam SS to Loc.no.164  is Common portion for Pakkam - Vinnamangalam & Vaniyambadi - Vinnamangalam and both lines are having their own numbers on same towers. Hence this portion is not mentioned in pakkam - vinnamangalam line as this portion is considered in vaniyambadi - vinnamangalam line with different numbering.
